lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches or dents. The interior shows no signs of wear. The engine is in perfect operating condition.
Mint condition.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute gem! This car is in truly mint condition, looking and feeling as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior, has been meticulously maintained to the highest standard. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking perfection and a driving experience that feels brand new!
The car is in poor condition. There is significant damage to the exterior and the interior is heavily worn. It has major mechanical issues and requires extensive repairs to be roadworthy.

This vehicle is in good, reliable condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. The exterior presents well, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper consistent with normal use. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts as it should. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only light wear on the driver's seat upholstery and floor mats. It is a dependable choice for anyone looking for a quality pre-owned vehicle that is ready for the road.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small scratch near the rear wheel well consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with the leather seats showing only slight bolstering wear. All electronics and features are fully functional. Mechanically, the car is solid; it has a complete service history and has recently undergone a routine inspection. It drives smoothly and reliably. This is a great opportunity for someone looking for a dependable, well-cared-for vehicle that presents very well despite a few signs of age.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Featuring a robust powertrain and a well-preserved interior, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Every component has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and aesthetic integrity. This is a distinguished choice for those who demand excellence and mechanical dependability.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape and has plenty of life left for its next adventure! Whether you're headed to work or hitting the open road for the weekend, this car is ready to go. It’s been well-cared for and runs like a charm. I've priced it to sell quickly, so come take it for a spin—I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Reliable performance. Priced for quick sale.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality. Meticulously maintained with a full service history, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts effortlessly. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows minor signs of careful road use consistent with its age, such as light stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, you’ll find a clean, non-smoking cabin with premium leather upholstery that remains taut and comfortable. All electronics, from the responsive dual-zone climate control to the premium infotainment system, are fully functional. Recent preventative maintenance includes a fresh set of performance tires and a new battery, ensuring it is ready for the road immediately. This car has been a reliable daily driver and is looking for a new owner who values a well-cared-for machine.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balance of luxury and proven reliability. Meticulously maintained and showcasing a consistent service history, this automobile delivers a refined driving experience and dependable performance. Its well-preserved interior and robust mechanical integrity ensure it remains a premier choice for those prioritizing value without compromising on quality.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, this motorcar offers a refined driving experience and proven reliability. We invite you to inspect this distinguished addition to our inventory, which balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty car and it's looking for a new home. It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in really solid shape! It runs great and has been well-loved, so you know you're getting something dependable. It's perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—I’m sure you’ll love it as much as I have!

This E92 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW's high-revving S65 V8 era. The naturally aspirated 4.0L engine pulls cleanly to its 8,400 RPM redline, benefiting from consistent maintenance of the individual throttle bodies and VANOS system. Power is delivered through a crisp transmission to an M-Variable locking differential, providing exceptional corner-exit traction. The chassis retains its structural rigidity, with the suspension bushings and dampers offering precise feedback and minimal body roll. A driver-focused machine that balances visceral performance with mechanical integrity.
Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully as a reliable, high-quality daily driver. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor, expected signs of road use such as a few small stone chips on the front bumper. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the leather upholstery shows gentle softening but remains free of tears or significant wear. All electronic features, from the responsive infotainment system to the ice-cold dual-zone climate control, are fully operational. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts seamlessly, backed by a consistent service history and a recent full-synthetic oil change. This car offers a perfect balance of performance and comfort, ready to provide many more miles of dependable service to its next owner.

Hey there! I'm looking to find a new home for my trusty ride. It’s been super reliable and runs like a dream! I’ve taken really great care of it, so it’s in wonderful shape and ready for your next road trip. It’s got a few minor signs of love from the road, but it looks fantastic and drives even better. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

This 2017 Ford Focus RS is a mechanically sound example of high-performance engineering, featuring the 2.3L EcoBoost inline-four equipped with a twin-scroll turbocharger and reinforced forged internals. The sophisticated GKN Twinster AWD system is fully operational, delivering precise dynamic torque vectoring for exceptional lateral grip. It features the factory-spec Brembo four-piston monoblock front calipers and adjustable Tenneco dampers that toggle effectively between drive modes. Recent service includes a comprehensive cooling system pressure test and a driveline fluid refresh. The short-throw six-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement with no synchro grind. While showing minor signs of use consistent with its history, the powertrain remains robust and the chassis rigidity is uncompromised.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Solid daily driver.

All electronic components—from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system—function perfectly. Under the hood, the car has benefited from a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule, resulting in a smooth, quiet idle and responsive acceleration. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide confident stopping power. This is a reliable, turn-key vehicle that has been cared for by an owner who values longevity and mechanical integrity. Complete service records are available upon request.
